title: FoundryX
description: FoundryX is a powerful and modern all-in-one Minecraft utility mod — an advanced alternative to Essentials, built for both Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge through a unified multi-loader system.
body:
FoundryX is a powerful and modern all-in-one Minecraft utility mod — an advanced alternative to Essentials, built for both Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge through a unified multi-loader system.
It enhances gameplay on both servers and single-player worlds with modular commands, smart tools, and easy configuration.
Whether you're building a small community server or a large-scale modpack, FoundryX provides the perfect foundation for a stable, customizable, and unified Minecraft experience.

Please comment, suggest new improvements or changes—I'd be very happy about everything!
Especially if you do so in the appropriate place.


GitHub: [check](https://github.com/Ap4uuk/FoundryX-Mod)
Public Readme: [check](https://github.com/Ap4uuk/FoundryX-Mod/blob/main/Permissions_README_EN.md)

Require LuckPerms, Client(SP) and Server.

✨ Features
🔧 Multi-loader support — Fully compatible with Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.

⚙️ Modular design — Enable or disable systems individually for flexible setups.

🧩 Server & client functionality — Works seamlessly in both single-player and multiplayer environments.

🧠 Utility commands — Includes advanced administrative and QoL commands similar to Essentials.

🌐 Customizable configuration — Easily tweak behavior, permissions, and gameplay options.

🧱 Integration ready — Built to work smoothly with other mods and APIs.

🚀 Optimized performance — Lightweight core designed for modern Minecraft versions.

Configuration
At first launch the mod creates config/foundryx.toml. The [language] section controls which localization is used for server-sent messages and formatted help descriptions:

 
[language]
language = "en_us" # Available options: en_us, ru_ru
Changing the value to ru_ru loads the new Russian translation file on the next server start.
